title: Settings
subtitle: Reporting currency, multi-currency tracking, and household invitations.

nickname.title: Your name
nickname.description: A short nickname shown in ownership labels and owner pickers. Leave it blank to use your full name ({{displayName}}).
nickname.label: Nickname

language.title: Language
language.description: The language used for menus, labels, and date / number formatting.
language.label: Language

theme.title: Appearance
theme.description: Choose a light or dark colour scheme. Your choice follows you across devices.
theme.label: Theme

carryoverDate.title: Carry-over date
carryoverDate.description: When you copy last month's figure into a new snapshot, this sets the statement date it starts with. You can still change the date before saving.
carryoverDate.label: Default date

modes.end_of_month_after_last_snapshot: End of the month after the last snapshot

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Net worth is reported in this currency. Turn on multi-currency to hold positions in other currencies and enter monthly exchange rates.

fx.title: Exchange rates
fx.description: One rate per month per currency — reporting-currency units per 1 unit of the foreign currency (the month-end rate). Later months reuse the most recent rate until you enter a new one.

invite.title: Invite someone to your household
invite.description: They'll receive an email with a sign-in link.

data.title: Backup
data.description: Download your entire household as a single file. Keep it somewhere safe, or use it to move your data to another device.

fidelity.label: What to include
fidelity.fullHint: Includes items you've deleted, so the copy is exact.
fidelity.compactedHint: A clean copy without anything you've deleted.

data.exportError: Couldn't prepare your backup. Please try again.
data.largeNote: Large households may take a moment.

restore.title: Restore from backup
restore.description: Replace everything in this household with the contents of a backup file. This is how you move your data onto a new device.
restore.chooseHint: Pick a backup file you downloaded earlier.
restore.previewError: That file couldn't be read as a backup. Please try another.
restore.stakesEmpty: This household is empty, so nothing will be lost.
restore.stakesWarning: This will permanently erase the {{count}} item currently in this household and replace it with the backup. This can't be undone.
restore.stakesWarning_other: This will permanently erase the {{count}} items currently in this household and replace them with the backup. This can't be undone.
restore.ack: I understand this replaces everything in this household.
restore.erasePrompt: Type {{word}} to confirm you want to erase and replace your data.
restore.dontClose: Restoring your data — please don't close this window.
